title: Notice on the reduction of the authorised capital
description: ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS, AB (hereinafter referred to as the “Company”) announces that, on 24 April 2026, the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders adopted a resolution to reduce the Company’s share capital in order to cancel 765,951 ordinary registered shares repurchased by the Company through share buyback processes.

title: Pranešimas apie įstatinio kapitalo mažinimą
description: Akcinė bendrovė „ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS“ (toliau – Bendrovė) praneša, kad 2026 m. balandžio 24 d. eilinis visuotinis akcininkų susirinkimas priėmė sprendimą sumažinti Bendrovės įstatinį kapitalą, siekiant anuliuoti per akcijų išpirkimo procesus Bendrovės įsigytus 765 951 vnt. savų paprastųjų vardinių akcijų.

(“DSC” or the “Company”) (NASDAQ: DSC), the AI application infrastructure for China’s used car industry, today announced that it has priced its initial public offering of 3,000,000 American depositary shares (“ADSs”) at US$17 per ADS, for a total offering size of approximately US$51 million, assuming the underwriters do not exercise their over-allotment option to purchase additional ADSs. title: REITIR: Útgáfa á nýjum skuldabréfaflokki - niðurstaða útboðs
description: Reitir hf. hefur lokið sölu á skuldabréfaflokki, REITIR 28, sem gefinn er út undir 130.000 m.kr. útgáfuramma félagsins. Tilboð bárust fyrir 4.028 m.kr. og ákveðið var að taka tilboðum að fjárhæð 3.000 m.kr., að nafnverði.

title: Notice of AGM
NIP Group Publishes 2025 Sustainability Report, Driving Global Growth and Cultural Inclusion in Digital Entertainment
description: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates, June 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NIP Group Inc. (“NIP Group” or the “Company”) (NASDAQ: NIPG) today announced the publication of its 2025 Sustainability Report. This marks the second consecutive year that the Company has formally disclosed its Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) performance, underscoring its long-term commitment to digital inclusion, compliant operations, and global community development.

title: Ophævelse af suspension i forbindelse med overflytning af afdelinger til Investeringsforeningen IA Invest
description: I forlængelse af meddelelse fra Investeringsforeningen TOBA Investments den 22. juni 2026 vedrørende suspension som følge af overflytning bekræftes det hermed, at der igen kan stilles priser i afdelingerne herunder, og at afdelingerne har første handelsdag i regi af Investeringsforeningen IA Invest.
